transcript: Speaker A: You can now learn chess on Duolingo. Yes, that chess. If you win, I'll eat my mustache. I won't be controlling that diagonal anymore. That was my favorite pawn! Dear diary, today I won another match.
on_screen_text:
you can now learn chess on duolingo
yes, that chess
Play Chess
If you win, I'll eat my mustache.
I won't be controlling that diagonal anymore.
That was my favorite pawn!
Dear diary, today I won another match.
Oscar checkmated you!
CONTINUE
Rematch?
duolingo
The world's #1 learning app.
DOWNLOAD NOW
summary: Duolingo introduces its new chess-learning feature through an animated gameplay demo. The ad showcases a humorous match against the character Oscar, highlighting interactive learning. It ends with a call to download the app.
